description: User clicks a Google or GitHub OAuth button on the login page
User completes OAuth exchange and is authenticated — server-side event fires in the callback route
OAuth code exchange fails (missing code, missing PKCE verifier, or exchange exception)
User explicitly signs out from a protected page
User submits the Find Jobs form — fires when the agent begins searching Adzuna
A single job has been scored and saved to the database — fires once per job
User saves a fully complete profile for the first time (is_complete flips to true)
Company research dossier is generated and saved to jobs.company_research
